stories.title: Schrager projects all 32 first-round picks: Four huge trades dominate his final NFL mock draft
stories.summary: Could teams jump all around Round 1 and shake things up? Will Jeremiyah Love and Sonny Styles go in the top five? Here's what Peter Schrager is hearing and predicting.

stories.title: NFL draft eve buzz: Everything we're hearing on the top-10 picks, possible trades in Round 1
stories.summary: Where are the Jets, Cardinals, Titans and Giants leaning with top-five picks? Will the Rams be a wild card? And who could be in play for the Browns?

stories.title: Chelsea fires coach Rosenior amid historic slump
stories.summary: Chelsea have sacked head coach Liam Rosenior following the club's damaging defeat to Brighton on Tuesday.

stories.title: Wemby concussed on hard fall in Spurs' G2 loss
stories.summary: Victor Wembanyama sustained a concussion on a hard fall during the second quarter of the Spurs' Game 2 playoff loss to the Trail Blazers.

stories.title: Royals, Hallmark unveil downtown ballpark plan
stories.summary: The Royals and Hallmark Cards announced they are teaming up to build a new ballpark in downtown Kansas City that would surround mixed-use development.
